response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable, broadly experienced software engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on work across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and his current role does touch AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor who is a recognized AI authority, can advise strategic enterprise customers, and can shape cloud product strategy at a principal/executive level. The candidate's profile is that of a strong hands-on engineer rather than a technical strategist or AI thought leader, with no advanced AI credentials, no published research or flagship AI product, and no visible track record of executive-level advisory or industry influence.
strengths: Approximately 20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure — well above the 15-year minimum
Active hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows in current role at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial background as founder of GISCollective, with open-source community contributions and a conference talk at FOSS4G
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and no evidence of recognized AI expertise such as publications, flagship AI platforms, or industry thought leadership
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners at an executive or enterprise level — a core responsibility of the role
Current and past seniority (Staff/Senior Engineer) is materially below the Director-level IC profile the role requires, with no visible track record of cross-organizational strategic influence

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or executive-level influence
Broad engineering depth and recent AI-agent work
